description: Warn when gbrowse dependencies have not been installed.

hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOT="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; if [ -z "$ROOT" ]; then ROOT="$GBROWSE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; fi; if [ -z "$ROOT" ]; then echo "[gbrowse] Plugin root not set. Set GBROWSE_PLUGIN_ROOT to the gbrowse plugin root."; exit 0; fi; if ! ([ -d "$ROOT/node_modules/playwright" ] && [ -d "$ROOT/node_modules/.bin" ]); then echo "[gbrowse] Dependencies not installed. Run: $ROOT/scripts/install.sh"; fi'
